extortion.description: About us  Sagam Groupe Furniture and Home Furnishings Manufacturing  SAGAM Groupe has specialized in furniture since 1973. It groups around one hundred stores under three banners: Géant du Meuble, Logial and Côté Meubles.  SAGAM Groupe provides purchasing and sales services for its banners, seeking out the best products to offer. On the other hand, it guarantees marketing operations to ensure their visibility to the general public.  Locations Primary 133 rue de Montreuil Paris, France 75011, FR
